metadata.description: Caplifi / Eclectic Ventures open agent standards: BRAND.md, HBI, SLOP.md, Caplifi Approve.

plugins.name: brandmd
plugins.description: BRAND.md open brand standard for agents: apply core brand under 600 tokens, load deeper files on demand, audit repo conformance.

plugins.name: hbi
plugins.description: Half-Baked Idea (HBI) open package format: init packages, advisory IP triage posture, disclosure gate discipline, and local conformance validation.

plugins.name: slopmd
plugins.description: SLOP.md open agent handoff envelopes plus INSTIGATE (execute) vs HANDOFF (discuss) document contracts for multi-agent work.

plugins.name: caplifi-approve
plugins.description: Caplifi Approve open contract (headgate.approve.v1): agents propose; humans approve irreversible access and execute work from a phone seat.
